hero.heading: Everyone Should Have the Opportunity to Get into AI and IT
hero.description: We make technical education accessible to everyone and empower learners with real skills in AI, programming, and digital innovation.

meta.title: We make IT-Seminars, AI & Digital Transformation easy | Kodschul
meta.description: At Kodschul we make IT-Seminars, AI & Digital Transformation easy for all.
meta.keywords: IT seminars, AI training, digital transformation, tech workshops, expert trainers, hands-on learning

mission.title:
Our Mission:
AI and IT for Everyone
mission.paragraph1: Our goal is to make AI and IT education accessible to all and ensure that anyone who is curious and ambitious can enter the world of technology. We are committed to providing inclusive, hands-on learning experiences that equip students with real skills in software development, machine learning, and digital innovation.
mission.paragraph2: At KodSchul, we believe that the future belongs to those who can harness technology - and we're here to make that future possible for everyone.
mission.paragraph3: By removing educational barriers, we enable learners to confidently engage with programming, artificial intelligence, and emerging technologies while achieving their professional goals.

team.heading: Meet the Team Driving Your Success

customized_training.title: Customized Training
customized_training.subtitle: Tailored seminars for companies and students that prepare for the future and take you to the next level.

business.title: For Companies
business.description: Every company is unique. That's why we offer trainings tailored to your company's needs, maximizing value and equipping your teams with the latest technologies.

students.title: For Students
students.description: 100% Hands-on 'Learn by Doing' guidance from experts. Our practice-oriented training offers certificates and opportunities that facilitate students' entry into the professional world.

individual.title: Individual Training
individual.description: We evaluate your current level in a short call and develop a customized training package precisely aligned with your goals, perfectly tailored to your needs.
